text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is here at last.<n>I've got my
work cut out for me,<n>going up against Opera O and
Doto,<n>but there has to be a way!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And then, suddenly, it starts raining!<n>But for
someone like me who runs on<n>any track, I can
work with poor<n>conditions! In fact, that's where I
excel! LET'S GET IIIT!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll show 'em the tenacity of the<n>All-Rounder!
That's right! A hero<n>doesn't choose their
battlefield!
